records.ety: [OF. veue, F. vue, fr. OF. veoir to see, p. p. veu, F. voir, p. p. vu, fr. L. videre to see. See Vision, and cf. Interview, Purview, Review, Vista.]

defs: The act of seeing or beholding; sight; look; survey; examination by the eye; inspection.
quotes: Thenceforth I thought thee worth my nearer view.
Objects near our view are thought greater than those of a larger size that are more remote.
Surveying nature with too nice a view.

defs: Mental survey; intellectual perception or examination; as, a just view of the arguments or facts in a case.
quotes: I have with exact view perused thee, Hector.

defs: Power of seeing, either physically or mentally; reach or range of sight; extent of prospect.
quotes: The walls of Pluto's palace are in view.

defs: That which is seen or beheld; sight presented to the natural or intellectual eye; scene; prospect; as, the view from a window.
quotes: 'T is distance lends enchantment to the view.

defs: The pictorial representation of a scene; a sketch, either drawn or painted; as, a fine view of Lake George.
Mode of looking at anything; manner of apprehension; conception; opinion; judgment; as, to state one's views of the policy which ought to be pursued.
quotes: To give a right view of this mistaken part of liberty.

defs: That which is looked towards, or kept in sight, as object, aim, intention, purpose, design; as, he did it with a view of escaping.
quotes: No man sets himself about anything but upon some view or other which serves him for a reason.
[Graces] which, by the splendor of her view Dazzled, before we never knew.

records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Viewed (vūd); p. pr. & vb. n. Viewing.]

defs: To see; to behold; especially, to look at with attention, or for the purpose of examining; to examine with the eye; to inspect; to explore.
quotes: O, let me view his visage, being dead.
Nearer to view his prey, and, unespied, To mark what of their state he more might learn.

defs: To survey or examine mentally; to consider; as, to view the subject in all its aspects.
quotes: The happiest youth, viewing his progress through.
